recent_projects.name: kinemotion
recent_projects.summary: Video-based kinematic analysis for athletic performance

recent_projects.name: olyptik
recent_projects.summary: Official Python SDK for Olyptik API

recent_projects.name: whop-sdk
recent_projects.summary: The official Python library for the Whop API
recent_projects.author: Whop

recent_projects.name: llmflowstack
recent_projects.summary: LLMFlowStack is a framework for training and using LLMs (LLaMA, GPT-OSS, Gemma, ...). Supports DAPT, fine-tuning, and distributed inference. Public fork without institution-specific components.

recent_projects.name: getout-of-text-3
recent_projects.summary: A Python toolkit for working with legal corpora and English datasets.

recent_projects.name: anaconda-auth
recent_projects.summary: A client auth library for Anaconda APIs

recent_projects.name: gspread-datarame
recent_projects.summary: Simple data utilities for spreadsheet operations
recent_projects.author: Data Tools Dev

recent_no_license_projects.name: mpcaHydro
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Python package for downloading MPCA hydrology data

recent_no_license_projects.name: PTJPLSM
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Priestley-Taylor Jet Propulsion Laboratory Soil Moisutre Evapotranspiration Model
recent_no_license_projects.author_email: Gregory Halverson <gregory.h.halverson@jpl.nasa.gov>, "Joshua B. Fisher" <jbfisher@chapman.edu>, "Claire S. Villanueva-Weeks" <claire.s.villanueva-weeks@jpl.gov>

recent_no_license_projects.name: pycompound
recent_no_license_projects.summary: Python package to perform compound identification in mass spectrometry via spectral library matching.

recent_no_license_projects.name: sql-smith
recent_no_license_projects.summary: sql-smith is an SQL query builder with zero dependencies and a fluent interface.
recent_no_license_projects.author: Zumuta!
